genre_refs: Arnold Friberg painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge'
description: Reproduction of the oil painting 'The Prayer at Valley Forge' by Arnold Friberg (signed lower-right). It depicts General George Washington in a Revolutionary War uniform with a red-lined dark cloak, kneeling in the snow with hands clasped in prayer beside his saddled white horse, in a wintry leafless forest with light breaking through. There is no added on-image text, caption, agency seal, or graphic overlay; the caption appears only in the tweet text. The painting is posted by the Department of Labor.
